subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1912-03-27
subcodes.first_line: What a great difference exists between men. One person degrades himself to such a degree that he idolizes and worships stones
subcodes.first_line_orig: چه قدر تفاوتست بین نفوس شخصی چنان خود را پست مینماید که پرستش جماد و اشکال
subcodes.subjects: @Buddhism and Hinduism; religions of the East, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @station of the Manifestation of God, @idolatry
